title: turraeanthus africanus
intro: Turraeanthus africanus, also known as the African turraeanthus, is a plant species belonging to the family Meliaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Turraeanthus africanus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Turraeanthus africanus is typically prepared as a herbal decoction, infusion, or paste for topical application, and in some cases, it is also used as a root bark extract in traditional medicine.
